title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown demonstrates how logarithmic transformations of complex images reveal underlying mathematical structure, using Escher's Print Gallery as a case study. The video explores conformal maps, complex exponentials, and logarithms to explain the geometric properties that make the artwork's self-similar spiral pattern possible.
